response.justification: The candidate is an experienced, versatile generalist with strong testing/craftsmanship habits and notable IDE-adjacent work (C/C++ components for NI LabWindows/CVI), but the role demands deep JVM expertise centered on Java, Kotlin, and the Spring ecosystem. Java appears only briefly and incidentally (robotic arms, orchestration tooling), Kotlin and Spring/Quarkus/Hibernate are absent entirely, and the core of their career is in TypeScript/Node and DLang. There is no evidence of language tooling or modern IDE-internals work on the JVM, which is the heart of this position.
strengths: Direct IDE development experience writing C/C++ components for NI LabWindows/CVI
Strong software-craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) on large-scale, high-throughput systems
Broad, deep engineering career across backend, distributed, and embedded systems
concerns: No Kotlin and no Spring/Quarkus/Hibernate experience, which are required qualifications
Java experience is minimal and peripheral; no demonstrated deep JVM understanding
No recent JVM language-tooling work; primary stack is TypeScript/Node and DLang
